node.text: Audrey sells the jewelry she makes and donates a portion of the profits to an animal shelter.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey donates to an animal shelter as a way of combining her passion for making jewelry and making a difference.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey adapts and continues to find ways to help even if she can't volunteer at the shelter anymore.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey makes jewelry out of recycled objects like bottle caps, buttons, and broken jewelry as a hobby.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "donate organization profits") on Session 22 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey's dogs feel loved and safe under her care.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "donate organization profits") on Session 28 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: Audrey had a knee injury that prevented her from walking her dogs, causing her to miss the joy they bring.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "donate organization profits") on Session 22 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Audrey took her dogs to the pet salon last Friday and was happy to see them looking cute and groomed.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "donate organization profits") on Session 28 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: Audrey worries about her dogs when they are in new places but was relieved to see them well-behaved at the salon.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "donate organization profits") on Session 28 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: Audrey appreciates creating a safe and fun space for her dogs, ensuring they feel secure.
